commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: day and night: He speaks after our manner, and signifies eternity.

commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: throne: The saints are the throne of God, above whom and among whom the Lord for ever dwells. <a

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Therefore they are before the throne of God.in his temple; i.e. therefore are they now happy in heaven, where the temple was represented to be, as observed before.
He that sitteth on the throne shall dwell, or dwelleth over them. (Witham)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
